name: Pet Chan
short_description: "Pet Chan" is a desktop pendant, Sexy character design, Dynamic character, Change of clothes, Add a layer of sexy to the desktop !
detailed_description:
"Pet Chan" is a desktop pendant, Can be placed anywhere on the computer desktop, Sexy character design, Dynamic character, Change of clothes, Add a layer of sexy to the desktop !

Game Features:
1.Sexy character design
2.Characters contain 6 sexy poses
3.All poses are dynamic
4.Contains 3 character clothes
5.Characters Freely zoom in, zoom out, move
6.Left mouse button can drag characters, Right mouse button to open function menu, Free transform
7."Pet Chan" is a sexy desktop pendant
